title: Herbalist
description: Adds blazebud and other new medicinal plants and fungi in to the game!
body:
The Herbalist mod is a simple mod that Adds blazebud and other new medicinal plants and fungi in to the game! [Buy me a coffee!](https://buymeacoffee.com/griffinpuc)
**Depends on the Tobacconist Mod, download [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/tobacconist)** View mod tutorial [here](https://youtu.be/4IgCRFiIh7I) Report issues [here](https://github.com/diggydwarff/herbalist/issues)
## Features ### New Medicinal Plants and Fungus: - Blazebud (and its products: cigarette, brownie, cookie, etc) - Dreamcap Mushroom - Goldenglow Mushroom - Snowcap Mushroom - Ethereal Fungus - Mirage Cactus - Diviners Sage - Extraction Station and multiple varieties of extracts to produce! - Plus more extracts, items, and products! ### New Items and Features: - New music discs - New paintings - A variety of new effects (as seen below) Introspection Effect: ![effect1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fUz5XpqI/images/19aba6da550b8f3c27e73034fedc2989b7f0fcc3.png) Ripped Effect: ![effect2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fUz5XpqI/images/0385e0798fe8e799c86b9218b04a83498af1fdc9.png) Dilirium Effect: ![effect3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fUz5XpqI/images/58772217868b865c5e7441a4dfadfcd532033c51.png) Desert Vision Effect: ![effecvt3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fUz5XpqI/images/d9ab40762bc89fb0d87947bbaaf2d80360d47262.png) Blazed Effect: ![blazed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fUz5XpqI/images/5ceaeb69061dfae1a1bffde010cf69c28253e7c2.png)
